---
title: "About"
---

I am Var Kurapati, a data science intern working with the PPBDS project. 
I investigated the critic-audience gap on Rotten Tomatoes because I was 
curious whether the disconnect between critics and general audiences is 
real and systematic, or just anecdotal. The data shows that genre plays 
a significant role — action and family films consistently score higher 
with audiences, while documentaries are rated more favorably by critics.
